checks.description: Generated or packaged prompt artifacts should not drift silently from source templates.

matchers.message: Generated artifact detected: make sure its source and regeneration command are covered elsewhere.

checks.description: Find runtime references to hosted telemetry, analytics, or external service calls.

matchers.message: Potential outbound telemetry or analytics surface is present.
Potential outbound network path is present.

checks.description: Find authority-conversion, urgency, shame, surveillance, or dependency-building language.

matchers.regex: apply now|don'?t be left behind|if you'?re serious|prove you belong
matchers.message: Urgency or shame-based persuasion is present.

matchers.regex: exactly the kind of|wants to fund|come work at|special kind of builder
matchers.message: Authority-conversion or status-signaling language is present.

matchers.regex: in the background|without consent|without asking|monitor usage|track sessions
matchers.message: Hidden collection or surveillance language is present.

matchers.regex: tell you exactly what to do|need a partner who knows your business deeply|push you every week
matchers.message: Dependency-building or obedience-oriented language is present.
